name: Brown Rice

pros.title: easy staple to build meals around
pros.explanation: Very practical in everyday meal planning.

pros.title: better category fit than white rice
pros.explanation: At least retains more fibre and micronutrients than more refined versions.

pros.title: often easy for people to tolerate
pros.explanation: A practical plus in some contexts.

cons.title: fibre is only moderate for a strong grain
glycemic behaviour is only okay
cons.explanation: Not one of the best grains on this dimension.

cons.title: micronutrient payoff is fairly average
cons.explanation: Does not stand out strongly in vitamins/minerals.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
